parsed.generic_mechanism: A replacement causal account moves belief more than cataloguing suspected benefits while postponing their tests, because the latter creates curiosity but leaves the old valuation available.

paraphrased_evidence.A: A reduces threat by protecting ordinary eating and autonomy, then recasts pleasure, comfort, reward, and belonging as learned attributions; however, it explicitly postpones testing those attributions, leaving much of the perceived payoff intact.
paraphrased_evidence.B: B gives a concrete withdrawal-relief and conditioning account, then applies it to taste, satisfaction, reward, and failed restriction. Its overbroad category, extreme comparisons, and repeated compliance demands weaken credibility and make the promised freedom feel less spacious.

paraphrased_evidence.ours: A reduces threat by protecting ordinary eating and autonomy, then recasts pleasure, comfort, reward, and belonging as learned attributions; however, it explicitly postpones testing those attributions, leaving much of the perceived payoff intact.
paraphrased_evidence.ref: B gives a concrete withdrawal-relief and conditioning account, then applies it to taste, satisfaction, reward, and failed restriction. Its overbroad category, extreme comparisons, and repeated compliance demands weaken credibility and make the promised freedom feel less spacious.

mapped.generic_mechanism: A replacement causal account moves belief more than cataloguing suspected benefits while postponing their tests, because the latter creates curiosity but leaves the old valuation available.
